message:
🐛 Guard against undefined config in dynamic card rendering (#4312) (#4323)

Custom/dynamic Tier 2 cards crash with "Cannot destructure property
'filter' of 'config' as it is undefined" when card.config is undefined.

- Default config to {} in DynamicCard and Tier2CardRuntime destructuring
- Add ?? {} fallback in all 6 places that pass card.config to components
- Guard useCardData, useCardFilters, useCardSort against undefined config
- Protect searchFields iteration and comparators access with ?. and || []

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -116,7 +116,7 @@ export const SortableCard = memo(function SortableCard({ card, onConfigure, onRe } > {CardComponent ? ( - + ) : (

Card type: {card.card_type}
